\section*{NAME}
codata\_constant\_type - data type defining a constant

\section*{SYNOPSIS}
{\ttfamily
Fortran: type(codata\_constant\_type) :: a

C: struct codata\_constant\_type a

}
\section*{DESCRIPTION}
Defines a constant with the name, the value, the uncertainty and the unit.

\section*{SEE ALSO}
codata(3)
